personal update
I'm joining @OpenAI to work on Codex! 

I think there are still a ton of great things to build on both mobile and desktop and there's no better team pushing that frontier than the Codex team. 
I'm super humbled and excited to be working with @ajambrosino

At 133 hours in, Codex has begun talking about Aztecs and now it's capitalizing random words like "Stable Views".

It's developing its own terminology.

Keep going, Codex. You can do it. https://t.co/MRsNU10zou
